why.title: Why Metaskills
why.intro: Our trainers are active AI consultants and deployment specialists. This industry immersion means every lesson is grounded in practical challenges and opportunities that matter today.

why.feat6Desc: Connect to Singapore's growing AI and digital innovation ecosystem through alumni events and industry partnerships.

testimonials.title: What Our Learners Say
testimonials.quote1: Within two months of completing the programme, I automated 30% of my reporting tasks using Agentic AI workflows. The trainers' real-world consulting experience made the training immediately applicable.
testimonials.quote2: Metaskills designed a customised AI upskilling programme for our managers. Beyond training, they worked with us to identify pilot projects where AI could deliver tangible business value.
testimonials.quote3: The course gave us a clear framework to evaluate Agentic AI opportunities while balancing governance and compliance. It's rare to have trainers who can bridge strategy with technical know-how this effectively.

footer.tagline: ASEAN's go-to partner for Agentic AI, Algorithmic Trading, and Cybersecurity capability building.

aboutPage.heroSubtitle: ASEAN's go-to partner for Agentic AI, Algorithmic Trading, and Cybersecurity capability building.
aboutPage.missionP1: Metaskills Institute is a next-generation training and advisory institute at the forefront of Agentic AI, Algorithmic Trading, and Cybersecurity. We equip organisations and professionals with the capabilities required to operate in an autonomous, AI-driven economy — where intelligent agents make decisions, cyber resilience determines survival, and financial markets are shaped by algorithms.
aboutPage.missionP2: We go beyond theory. Our programmes integrate technical depth, strategic thinking, and implementation frameworks aligned with enterprise standards. Our master trainers, many with over a decade of experience teaching in local universities and institutions, design the direction and curriculum. This ensures every instructor delivers value rooted in real-world consulting and deployment projects.
aboutPage.visionP1: Metaskills Institute is a premier Digital Science Institute in Asia that is made up of the most respected and passionate practitioners and leaders, many who are Ph.Ds, in the field of digital science and transformation.
aboutPage.visionP2: Our passion is to support individuals towards Digital Skills Mastery in high job demand areas such as Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Web Technologies, amongst others. With over 8 years of practical experience working on bespoke implementations of data driven strategies, our faculty and consultants have developed training programmes and certification standards that are high and relevant for existing and future industries.
aboutPage.pillar1Desc: Designing, deploying, and governing autonomous AI agents for real-world enterprise applications.
aboutPage.pillar2Desc: Data-driven trading strategies powered by automation and analytics for financial markets.
aboutPage.pillar3Desc: Securing digital infrastructures, safeguarding AI systems, and building compliance-ready architectures.
aboutPage.pillar4Desc: Trusted by corporates, universities, and government agencies across Singapore and ASEAN as a go-to partner for capability building.
aboutPage.langDesc: Our programmes are available in English, Chinese, and Vietnamese — reaching professionals and organisations across Singapore and the wider ASEAN region.

facultyPage.heroSubtitle: Industry leaders and domain experts driving AI education, business transformation, and professional development across Asia.

agenticFoundations.title: Foundations of Agentic AI Workflows
agenticFoundations.tagline: Discover the basics of AI-driven systems to transform decision-making processes.
agenticFoundations.whyAttend: In today's fast-paced environment, understanding how to harness AI-driven workflows is essential. This introductory workshop equips you with the core concepts and practical tools to implement agentic systems that streamline and enhance decision-making.
agenticFoundations.courseDesign: This two-day workshop provides a comprehensive introduction to agentic AI workflows. Participants will learn about the fundamentals of AI agents, explore common tools used to build these systems, and engage in hands-on exercises that simulate real-world applications.
agenticFoundations.objective1: Understand the core principles and components of agentic AI systems.
agenticFoundations.objective2: Identify common tools and platforms used in developing AI workflows.
agenticFoundations.objective3: Explore real-world applications and operational scenarios.
agenticFoundations.objective4: Gain hands-on experience by building basic AI agentic workflows.
agenticFoundations.objective5: Develop an operational mindset for integrating AI into decision-making processes.

agenticUseCase.title: Empowering Agentic AI with LLMs and Use-Case Development
agenticUseCase.tagline: Harness the power of language models to create dynamic, autonomous agentic systems.
agenticUseCase.whyAttend: This workshop focuses on integrating large language models (LLMs) into agentic AI frameworks, enabling participants to design and implement systems that act as autonomous agents.
agenticUseCase.courseDesign: This two-day workshop dives into the intermediate realm of agentic AI. Through lectures and practical exercises, the course covers building AI agents capable of initiating actions, making decisions, and evolving based on feedback.
agenticUseCase.objective1: Deepen your understanding of agentic AI and autonomous decision-making systems.
agenticUseCase.objective2: Learn to integrate LLMs into agentic workflows to enhance system autonomy.
agenticUseCase.objective3: Develop practical skills in coding, API integration, and prompt engineering.
agenticUseCase.objective4: Explore real-world scenarios where agentic AI transforms operational processes.
agenticUseCase.objective5: Design and present tailored AI use cases leveraging agentic systems.

agenticDeploy.title: Deploying and Securing Advanced Agentic AI Systems
agenticDeploy.tagline: Master the deployment of autonomous AI agents in secure, scalable environments.
agenticDeploy.whyAttend: Deploying agentic AI systems in secure, reliable environments is critical for high-stakes operations. This advanced workshop is tailored for professionals ready to transition from development to robust, production-level deployment.
agenticDeploy.courseDesign: This two-day workshop concentrates on advanced deployment and operationalization of agentic AI systems, with emphasis on on-premise deployment strategies, security protocols, and scalability.
agenticDeploy.objective1: Understand the unique challenges of deploying autonomous agentic AI systems.
agenticDeploy.objective2: Gain insights into secure deployment practices and on-premise integration.
agenticDeploy.objective3: Learn advanced troubleshooting and integration techniques.
agenticDeploy.objective4: Develop strategies for scaling agentic AI systems with strict security.
agenticDeploy.objective5: Apply knowledge in hands-on simulation labs.

pythonDataAnalytics.whyAttend: Taught by Leading Singaporean Data Scientists working on existing Data Science and A.I Projects with MNCs and Government Bodies. This programme is uniquely designed by industry leaders in Data Science, AI, Machine Learning and Deep Learning.
pythonDataAnalytics.courseDesign: Conducted over 2 blocks — each block covers 2 weekday evenings (7 pm to 10.30 pm) and a full Saturday (9 am to 6 pm). Total training hours: 30 hours.

pythonDataAnalytics.objective2: Learn essential data wrangling techniques – import, inspect, clean, merge, and transform data.
pythonDataAnalytics.objective3: Learn how to present data and insights with visualizations.
pythonDataAnalytics.objective4: Apply all the learned techniques on real-world datasets and use-cases.

pythonDataAnalytics.afterCompleting2: Make better and informed business decisions using data

certifiedDataAnalyst.whyAttend: The Certified Data Analyst programme equips you with the analytical skills and tools needed to extract insights from complex datasets. This certification is recognised across Singapore and ASEAN.

algoTradingL1.title: Algorithmic Trading Mastery in Financial Markets for Non-Professionals — Level 1
algoTradingL1.tagline: Take your first step towards becoming a successful trader in the trillion dollar Forex, Gold and Crypto markets.
algoTradingL1.whyAttend:
Most top tier investors do not reveal their investment secrets but after profiting sufficiently through shrewd investment strategies over the years, our experts have decided to unlock their knowledge and skills to a wider community so that more can benefit from the exciting new market that has emerged with technology advances.

This course has been designed to teach you the essentials of trading on the world's most popular trading platform, Meta Trader 4 (MT4) and auto-trade the strategies or algorithm that you are comfortable with and learn to manage your risk to generate consistent income.

Algorithmic trading, also called 'Auto Trading' or 'System Trading,' uses electronic platforms such as MetaTrader 4/5 to enter trading orders with an algorithm. The main benefit of algorithmic trading is that it does not make decisions based on emotions. It can also help you take more trades, as you're not limited by your ability to sit at the computer and enter orders manually. It is essential to note that there are risks associated but all these can be mitigated and taught hands on in this unique course. Start making passive and sustainable income now!
algoTradingL1.courseDesign: Full Hands-On with Coaching Outside Classes. Classes are all On-Site at our CT Hub premises. Class sizes are capped to enhance students' learning experience. 3 evenings (7 pm to 10 pm), 9 hours total.
algoTradingL1.objective1: Any aspiring trader who is just starting out and who wants to kickstart their financial trading journey to begin earning passive income using trading robots.
algoTradingL1.objective2: Anyone who wants to learn about Expert Advisors using MT4's largest online store of trading robots, technical indicators, panels, libraries, analyzers in MT4.
algoTradingL1.objective3: No prior trading experience is required. This MetaTrader course is designed for traders who are just starting out, or for those who have never used MetaTrader 4.
algoTradingL1.whatYouLearn2: Market profile of forex, gold and crypto markets on MT4 trading platform
algoTradingL1.whatYouLearn4: Power of leverage, compounding and concept of expected payout
algoTradingL1.whatYouLearn5: Financial mechanics of trading on MT4 platform

algoTradingL2.title: Algorithmic Trading Mastery in Financial Markets for Non-Professionals — Level 2
algoTradingL2.tagline: Advanced algorithmic trading strategies with backtesting, optimization, and proprietary EAs for the Forex, Gold and Crypto markets.
algoTradingL2.whyAttend:
Building on Level 1, this advanced programme takes you deeper into the world of algorithmic trading. Most top tier investors do not reveal their investment secrets but after profiting sufficiently through shrewd investment strategies over the years, our experts have decided to unlock their knowledge and skills to a wider community.

This course has been designed to teach you the essentials of trading on the world's most popular trading platform, Meta Trader 4 (MT4) and auto-trade the strategies or algorithm that you are comfortable with and learn to manage your risk to generate consistent income.

Participants who have completed the course will be eligible to participate in a Metaskills Institute competition with $100 for top prize and $50 x 2 for consolation prizes.
algoTradingL2.courseDesign: Jointly offered with JCube Institute (On-Site Classes). Classes are all On-Site at our CT Hub premises. Class sizes are capped to enhance students' learning experience. 3 evenings (7 pm to 10 pm), 9 hours total.
algoTradingL2.objective1: Any aspiring trader who wants to advance their algorithmic trading skills beyond Level 1.
algoTradingL2.objective2: Anyone who wants to learn advanced Expert Advisor strategies, backtesting, and optimization.
algoTradingL2.objective3: Pre-requisite: Participants are required to complete Algorithmic Trading Mastery Level 1.

algoTradingL2.whatYouLearn2: Optimize on parameters of each strategy

riseAiAgents.title: The Rise of AI Agents in 2026: Automating Everything with Intelligent AI Systems Now
riseAiAgents.tagline: A comprehensive introduction to the world of AI automation and autonomous agents.
riseAiAgents.whyAttend: This course maps the current landscape: what AI agents are, how they differ from traditional automation, what no-code and low-code platforms exist, how organisations are deploying agents for scheduling, reporting, knowledge management, and decision support, and what the emerging trends are (multi-agent systems, personal AI assistants, agentic security).
riseAiAgents.courseDesign: A one-day workshop with live demonstrations, hands-on exercises, and a guided learning path assessment.
riseAiAgents.objective1: Understand what AI agents are and how they differ from traditional automation.
riseAiAgents.objective2: Explore no-code and low-code AI platforms.
riseAiAgents.objective3: See live demonstrations of leading agent platforms.
riseAiAgents.objective4: Build a simple automated workflow hands-on.
riseAiAgents.objective5: Map out which courses match your role and goals.

buildAiNoCode.tagline: Create agentic AI workflows using visual automation — no programming required.
buildAiNoCode.whyAttend: Learn to create agentic AI workflows using n8n visual automation platform. Create workflows by connecting nodes, integrating APIs, and embedding AI agent nodes — all with drag-and-drop.

buildAiNoCode.objective3: Test, debug, and deploy functional workflows.

buildOpTools.whyAttend: Build operationally relevant tools (data pipelines, report generators, dashboards) using AI coding agents. Follow a structured five-layer approach: define the goal, provide organisational context, set boundaries, write clear instructions, and capture lessons.

buildAiTutors.whyAttend: For L&D professionals. Build custom AI tutors and adaptive learning pathways using Gems, NotebookLM, and chatbot prototyping tools. Covers on-premise vs. cloud deployment, security, and scaling strategies.
buildAiTutors.courseDesign: A one-day workshop for L&D professionals on building adaptive AI tutors.
buildAiTutors.objective1: Build custom AI tutors with adaptive learning pathways.
buildAiTutors.objective2: Use Gems, NotebookLM, and chatbot prototyping tools.
buildAiTutors.objective3: Evaluate on-premise vs. cloud deployment options.
buildAiTutors.objective4: Implement security measures for learning AI systems.
buildAiTutors.objective5: Scale AI tutors for organisational learning environments.
buildAiTutors.nextRunDate: Contact admissions@metaskills.sg for next run dates

cyberRolesThreats.title: Cybersecurity: Roles, Threats, and Certification Pathways
cyberRolesThreats.tagline: Comprehensive cybersecurity overview — fundamentals, roles, threats, and certification roadmap.
cyberRolesThreats.whyAttend: Covers fundamentals (CIA triad, zero trust, risk management), the current threat landscape, key roles (SOC analyst, pen tester, forensic investigator, AI security specialist), and major certification pathways (Security+, CySA+, SecAI, CEH, CHFI). Participants build a personalised 12 to 24 month certification roadmap.
cyberRolesThreats.courseDesign: A one-day comprehensive workshop covering cybersecurity fundamentals, career roles, and certification planning.
cyberRolesThreats.objective1: Understand cybersecurity fundamentals including CIA triad and zero trust.
cyberRolesThreats.objective3: Explore key cybersecurity roles and career paths.
cyberRolesThreats.objective4: Map major certification pathways (Security+, CySA+, CEH, CHFI).
cyberRolesThreats.objective5: Build a personalised 12–24 month certification roadmap.
cyberRolesThreats.nextRunDate: Contact admissions@metaskills.sg for next run dates

aiStrategyLeaders.title: AI Strategy and Roadmap for Leaders
aiStrategyLeaders.tagline: A strategy workshop for senior leaders to evaluate AI potential and build adoption plans.
aiStrategyLeaders.whyAttend: The morning covers AI fundamentals in plain language — what AI can and cannot do, how generative AI works, real defence and government use cases, and ethical risks leaders must manage. The afternoon is a hands-on strategy exercise: teams identify a real challenge, assess whether AI can help, and develop a practical roadmap with milestones, resource requirements, and risk mitigations.
aiStrategyLeaders.courseDesign: A one-day strategy workshop combining AI fundamentals with hands-on roadmap development. No technical background required.
aiStrategyLeaders.objective1: Understand AI fundamentals in plain language.
aiStrategyLeaders.objective2: Evaluate real defence and government AI use cases.
aiStrategyLeaders.objective3: Identify challenges where AI can provide value.
aiStrategyLeaders.objective4: Develop a practical AI adoption roadmap.
aiStrategyLeaders.objective5: Manage ethical risks and resource requirements.
aiStrategyLeaders.nextRunDate: Contact admissions@metaskills.sg for next run dates

aiAccountability.title: Who Is Accountable When AI Decides?
aiAccountability.tagline: Tackle the accountability question for AI-driven decisions head-on.
aiAccountability.whyAttend: When an AI system processes a procurement request, triages maintenance tickets, or drafts operational communications, who is responsible if something goes wrong? This workshop tackles accountability through realistic scenarios. Learn to separate decisions that must stay with humans from tasks AI can handle, and design oversight models that work at operational speed.
aiAccountability.courseDesign: A one-day workshop with realistic scenarios and group exercises designing accountability models. No technical background required.
aiAccountability.objective1: Separate human-accountable decisions from AI-delegable tasks.
aiAccountability.objective2: Design oversight models that work at operational speed.
aiAccountability.objective3: Identify where human judgment remains irreplaceable.
aiAccountability.objective4: Build an accountability model for your unit's AI use.
aiAccountability.nextRunDate: Contact admissions@metaskills.sg for next run dates

governingAiAgents.title: Governing AI Agents: Trust, Boundaries, and Audit Trails
governingAiAgents.tagline: Set boundaries and trace every AI agent action back to human authority.
governingAiAgents.whyAttend: Learn to set clear boundaries for what an AI agent may and may not do (spending limits, data access, communication permissions, time windows), assign levels of autonomy based on risk and mission criticality, and trace any AI action back through a chain of authority.
governingAiAgents.courseDesign: A one-day workshop on AI agent governance with boundary design exercises. No technical background required.
governingAiAgents.objective1: Set clear boundaries for AI agent permissions and autonomy.
governingAiAgents.objective2: Assign autonomy levels based on risk and mission criticality.
governingAiAgents.objective3: Build audit trails tracing AI actions to human authority.
governingAiAgents.objective4: Design boundary frameworks for realistic agent scenarios.
governingAiAgents.objective5: Handle situations when agents exceed their authority.
governingAiAgents.nextRunDate: Contact admissions@metaskills.sg for next run dates

aiWargaming.title: AI Wargaming: Test Decisions Before They Count
aiWargaming.tagline: Hands-on wargaming exercise where AI tools serve as analytical advisors.
aiWargaming.whyAttend: Teams construct a strategic scenario, then use AI to generate options, challenge assumptions, and simulate adversarial responses at each decision point. The exercise integrates governance: before the game begins, teams define what the AI advisor is and is not allowed to do, and after the game, they evaluate whether the AI stayed within bounds.
aiWargaming.courseDesign: A one-day hands-on wargaming exercise combining AI decision-making with governance evaluation. No technical background required.
aiWargaming.objective1: Use AI tools as analytical advisors in wargaming exercises.
aiWargaming.objective2: Construct strategic scenarios and generate AI-driven options.
aiWargaming.objective3: Challenge assumptions and simulate adversarial responses.
aiWargaming.objective4: Define and enforce AI advisor guardrails.
aiWargaming.objective5: Evaluate AI behaviour against governance boundaries.
aiWargaming.nextRunDate: Contact admissions@metaskills.sg for next run dates

mccFoundation.title: MSI CyberCore+ (MCC+) Cyber Defence Foundation
mccFoundation.tagline: 4-day intensive foundation covering core cybersecurity knowledge across all major certifications.
mccFoundation.whyAttend: A 4-day intensive foundation that covers the core knowledge shared across all major cybersecurity certifications: threat landscape, network security, system hardening, incident response, and risk management. After completing MCC+, participants only need 1 additional day per certification elective instead of 4–5 days each.
mccFoundation.courseDesign: A 4-day intensive programme consolidating shared cybersecurity foundations aligned to CompTIA and EC-Council domains.
mccFoundation.objective1: Master core cybersecurity knowledge across all major certifications.
mccFoundation.objective2: Understand threat landscape, network security, and system hardening.
mccFoundation.objective3: Learn incident response and risk management fundamentals.
mccFoundation.objective4: Prepare for Security+, CySA+, CEH, and CHFI certifications.
mccFoundation.objective5: Save training time with consolidated foundational programme.
mccFoundation.nextRunDate: Contact admissions@metaskills.sg for next run dates

mccSecurityOps.title: MCC+ Security Operations (CompTIA Security+ Aligned)
mccSecurityOps.tagline: 1-day elective aligned to CompTIA Security+ domains.
mccSecurityOps.whyAttend: Builds on the MCC+ foundation to cover security architecture, IAM, network monitoring, and operational controls specific to the Security+ examination. Requires MCC+ completion.
mccSecurityOps.courseDesign: Intensive 1-day elective building on MCC+ foundation. Requires MCC+ completion.
mccSecurityOps.objective3: Implement network monitoring and operational controls.
mccSecurityOps.objective5: Apply security operations concepts in practice.
mccSecurityOps.nextRunDate: Contact admissions@metaskills.sg for next run dates

mccThreatHunting.title: MCC+ Threat Hunting and Blue Team (CompTIA CySA+ Aligned)
mccThreatHunting.tagline: 1-day elective aligned to CompTIA CySA+ domains.
mccThreatHunting.whyAttend: Builds on the MCC+ foundation to cover threat detection, log analysis, behavioural analytics, and SOC workflows for identifying advanced threats. Requires MCC+ completion.
mccThreatHunting.courseDesign: Intensive 1-day elective building on MCC+ foundation. Requires MCC+ completion.
mccThreatHunting.objective1: Master threat detection and log analysis.
mccThreatHunting.objective2: Apply behavioural analytics for threat hunting.
mccThreatHunting.objective3: Implement SOC workflows for advanced threat identification.
mccThreatHunting.nextRunDate: Contact admissions@metaskills.sg for next run dates

mccOffensiveCyber.title: MCC+ Offensive Cyber Fundamentals (EC-Council CEH Aligned)
mccOffensiveCyber.tagline: 1-day elective aligned to EC-Council CEH domains.
mccOffensiveCyber.whyAttend: Builds on the MCC+ foundation to cover ethical hacking methodology: reconnaissance, scanning, enumeration, vulnerability assessment, and basic exploitation techniques. Requires MCC+ completion.
mccOffensiveCyber.courseDesign: Intensive 1-day elective building on MCC+ foundation. Requires MCC+ completion.
mccOffensiveCyber.nextRunDate: Contact admissions@metaskills.sg for next run dates

mccDigitalForensics.title: MCC+ Digital Forensics and Incident Investigation (EC-Council CHFI Aligned)
mccDigitalForensics.tagline: 1-day elective aligned to EC-Council CHFI domains.
mccDigitalForensics.whyAttend: Builds on the MCC+ foundation to cover digital evidence collection, forensic investigation, chain-of-custody documentation, and incident reconstruction. Requires MCC+ completion.
mccDigitalForensics.courseDesign: Intensive 1-day elective building on MCC+ foundation. Requires MCC+ completion.
mccDigitalForensics.nextRunDate: Contact admissions@metaskills.sg for next run dates

mccAiSecurity.title: MCC+ AI Security and Autonomous Defence (CompTIA SecAI Aligned)
mccAiSecurity.tagline: 1-day elective aligned to CompTIA SecAI domains.
mccAiSecurity.whyAttend: Builds on the MCC+ foundation to cover AI-specific threats (adversarial attacks, data poisoning, model theft), AI security lifecycle, and defence strategies for autonomous AI systems. Requires MCC+ completion.
mccAiSecurity.courseDesign: Intensive 1-day elective building on MCC+ foundation. Requires MCC+ completion.
mccAiSecurity.objective1: Understand AI-specific threats including adversarial attacks and data poisoning.
mccAiSecurity.objective3: Implement defence strategies for autonomous AI systems.
mccAiSecurity.objective4: Address model theft and AI supply chain risks.

vibeCodingDigitalBuilders.title: Vibe Coding for Digital Builders (Partnership with Tinkercademy)
vibeCodingDigitalBuilders.tagline: Leverage AI-driven tools like ChatGPT, Figma, and Lovable to rapidly prototype, design, and deploy web applications.
vibeCodingDigitalBuilders.whyAttend:
Generative AI is reshaping the way organisations approach digital transformation, product design, and application development. This workshop provides hands-on experience in leveraging AI-driven tools like ChatGPT, Figma, and Lovable to rapidly prototype, design, and deploy web applications.

IMDA is one of our client pool for this programme.
vibeCodingDigitalBuilders.courseDesign: A practical two-day workshop. Day 1 focuses on problem discovery, research, and solution design using ChatGPT. Day 2 covers UI prototyping with Figma and full-stack web app development with Lovable. Participants are provided with paid ChatGPT Business and Lovable plans for the duration of the course.
vibeCodingDigitalBuilders.objective1: Understand the fundamentals and practical applications of generative AI tools like ChatGPT.
vibeCodingDigitalBuilders.objective2: Conduct in-depth problem analysis and generate comprehensive solution proposals.
vibeCodingDigitalBuilders.objective3: Develop responsive user interface designs and wireframes using Figma.
vibeCodingDigitalBuilders.objective4: Rapidly build and deploy web applications through vibe coding with Lovable and Supabase.
vibeCodingDigitalBuilders.objective5: Evaluate the impact and integration strategies of AI tools within your organisation's digital transformation initiatives.
vibeCodingDigitalBuilders.scheduleDay1Item1: Problem discovery and analysis with ChatGPT
vibeCodingDigitalBuilders.scheduleDay1Item3: User persona creation and UAT writing
vibeCodingDigitalBuilders.scheduleDay2Item1: Visual design and prototyping with Figma
vibeCodingDigitalBuilders.scheduleDay2Item3: Vibe coding with Lovable and Supabase
vibeCodingDigitalBuilders.scheduleDay2Item4: Build, debug, and deploy a complete web app
vibeCodingDigitalBuilders.nextRunDate: Contact admissions@metaskills.sg for next run dates
vibeCodingDigitalBuilders.feesSelfSponsored: 16 pax and above: S$650/pax | 12–15 pax: S$750/pax | 8–11 pax: S$870/pax
vibeCodingDigitalBuilders.feesCorporateSmall: 7 or fewer participants: S$6,800 flat fee

awsCloudDevOps.title: Advanced Certificate in AWS Cloud Solutions Architecture and DevOps Engineering
awsCloudDevOps.tagline: Design resilient cloud architectures, implement automated testing, and establish robust DevOps pipelines.
awsCloudDevOps.whyAttend:
Cloud computing continues to reshape how organisations build, ship, and operate software at scale. This programme equips technology professionals with the end-to-end competencies needed to design resilient cloud architectures, implement automated testing strategies, and establish robust DevOps pipelines, all within a leading public cloud ecosystem.

Through six progressive modules, participants move from design thinking and prototyping through cloud service orchestration, test automation, CI/CD pipeline construction, and infrastructure-as-code practices, culminating in a team-based capstone that mirrors a real-world product delivery cycle.

Whether you are a software developer seeking to deepen your cloud fluency, a technical project manager aiming to streamline delivery workflows, or a business analyst bridging the gap between strategy and implementation, this programme provides an immersive, skills-first pathway guided by certified cloud practitioners and experienced technologists.
awsCloudDevOps.courseDesign: Six progressive modules combining instructor-led walkthroughs with hands-on lab exercises. Each module builds on the previous, progressing from design thinking through cloud architecture, test automation, CI/CD pipelines, DevOps engineering, and culminating in a team-based capstone project.
awsCloudDevOps.objective1: Apply design thinking frameworks and rapid prototyping techniques to translate business requirements into cloud application blueprints.
awsCloudDevOps.objective2: Architect cloud-based solutions by selecting, configuring, and integrating core infrastructure, compute, storage, and database services.
awsCloudDevOps.objective3: Implement test-driven development (TDD) practices, including unit, integration, and end-to-end testing, within cloud development environments.
awsCloudDevOps.objective4: Construct CI/CD pipelines that automate the build, test, release, and deployment stages of the software delivery lifecycle.
awsCloudDevOps.objective5: Operationalise DevOps principles by provisioning infrastructure as code, decomposing applications into microservices, and configuring real-time monitoring and alerting.
awsCloudDevOps.objective6: Synthesise skills from all prior modules in a collaborative capstone project.
awsCloudDevOps.scheduleDay1: Module 1: Design Thinking and Cloud Application Prototyping
awsCloudDevOps.scheduleDay2: Module 2: Core Cloud Services and Solution Architecture
awsCloudDevOps.scheduleDay2Item3: Core cloud services: storage, compute, databases
awsCloudDevOps.scheduleDay2Item4: Programmatic interaction via SDKs and CLI
awsCloudDevOps.scheduleDay3Item1: Unit tests with PyTest and Jest
awsCloudDevOps.scheduleDay3Item2: Agile user stories to Gherkin test scenarios
awsCloudDevOps.scheduleDay3Item4: End-to-end testing with Cypress or Selenium
awsCloudDevOps.scheduleDay6Item1: Architect, build, and deploy cloud-hosted app
awsCloudDevOps.nextRunDate: Contact admissions@metaskills.sg for next run dates

imda.title: Vibe Coding for IMDA
imda.description: Metaskills Institute partners with Tinkercademy to deliver Vibe Coding training across the entire Infocomm Media Development Authority — equipping public officers with AI-assisted development capabilities.

agenticPage.heroSubtitle: AI is becoming autonomous. Governance is no longer optional.
agenticPage.whatIsP1: Agentic AI refers to artificial intelligence systems that can plan, decide, and act autonomously. Unlike traditional AI that responds to single prompts, agentic AI can execute complex, multi-step workflows independently.
agenticPage.whatIsP2: These systems leverage tools, access data sources, maintain memory across interactions, and make decisions to accomplish goals — fundamentally changing how enterprises operate.
agenticPage.failTitle: Why Most AI Agent Deployments Fail in Enterprises
agenticPage.failSubtitle: Without governance, autonomous AI becomes a liability.
agenticPage.failQuote: "As AI becomes autonomous, governance becomes critical."
agenticPage.govFrameworksDesc: Governments worldwide, led by Singapore's IMDA, are introducing governance frameworks specifically designed for autonomous AI agents — focusing on accountability, control, and verification.
agenticPage.emergingStandardsDesc: Industry bodies are establishing standards for agentic AI deployment, covering agent identity, permission boundaries, audit requirements, and inter-agent communication protocols.
agenticPage.enterpriseInfraDesc: Agentic AI is rapidly shifting from experimentation to enterprise infrastructure. Organizations that embed governance early will lead; those that don't will face regulatory and operational risk.
agenticPage.solutionDesc: We provide a full end-to-end system — not just tools. Every layer is designed for enterprise-grade control, compliance, and scale.
agenticPage.trustPlaneDesc: Policies, roles, and authority boundaries that define what agents can and cannot do.
agenticPage.execPlaneDesc: Controlled workflow execution with policy enforcement at every step.
agenticPage.verifyLayerDesc: Pre-action checks, validation gates, and human-in-the-loop approvals.
agenticPage.observeLayerDesc: Real-time logs, monitoring dashboards, and comprehensive audit trails.
agenticPage.bpoDesc: Automated SLA management, intelligent ticketing, and triage with full audit compliance.
agenticPage.finDesc: Compliance-first AI agents for reporting, reconciliation, and regulatory processes.
agenticPage.copilotDesc: AI assistants with governed access to enterprise data, tools, and decision frameworks.
agenticPage.decisionDesc: Multi-agent systems that support strategic decisions with traceable reasoning chains.
agenticPage.regulatedDesc: Healthcare, finance, and government deployments requiring strict governance controls.
agenticPage.whyMsiSubtitle: We don't just advise — we build, deploy, and govern.
agenticPage.whyMsi1: Deep expertise in agentic AI and enterprise systems
agenticPage.whyMsi2: Experience across ASEAN organizations and industries
agenticPage.whyMsi3: Focus on governance and real-world deployment
agenticPage.whyMsi4: Strong integration capability with existing enterprise tools
agenticPage.ctaDesc: We design and deploy end-to-end agentic AI systems where every action is controlled, auditable, and aligned with business rules.

clientsPage.heroSubtitle: From government agencies to multinational corporations, our faculty and consultants have trained and partnered with organisations across Singapore and the region.
clientsPage.workedWithDesc: Training, consulting, product development, and masterclasses delivered across all organisational levels.
clientsPage.ctaDesc: Ready to upskill your team? Contact us for customised training solutions tailored to your organisation's needs.
clientsPage.additionalNda: … and many other organisations under NDA

partnersPage.heroSubtitle: Collaborating with industry leaders across Singapore and ASEAN.
partnersPage.integrumDesc: An A.I. consulting and development outfit that delivers decision-making capabilities for complex use-cases. Specializes in developing prediction and decision engines using alternative data.
partnersPage.jcubeDesc: A partner institute co-founded by Dr Ke Jinghao, offering certified Data Analyst and Data Scientist programmes with hands-on, project-based curriculum.
partnersPage.svbbDesc: Facilitating cross-border collaboration between Singapore and Vietnam, enabling knowledge exchange and business networking across ASEAN.
